channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pot hole almost as deep as a tennis ball, 4th March
item.description:
The photo shows the pot hole adjacent to the sign to The Uplands. This was reported under 8703911 then reported again under 8904482. I have received an email to say this has been fixed but this is erroneous as no repair has been made. Since the original report the pot hole has continued to deteriorate and is now almost the depth of a tennis ball.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes around two road drains Cirencester Rd, between Chancel Way & Spirax Sarco, 4th March
item.description:
Potholes around two road drains Cirencester Rd, between Chancel Way & Spirax Sarco
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Langton Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress and other litter, 4th March
item.description:
In the layby on the left as you head towards Gloucester, near the Leigh turning. The whole of the A38 is disgusting - there is just so much litter everywhere! On the layby opposite nearby there is also dumped litter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole, 4th March
item.description:
Where Willowherb Close meets Whitethorn Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Willowherb Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrians forced to walk in main road as pavement blocked, 4th March
item.description:
10 Hatherley Road GL51 6DX Loss.target.achieving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement
